name: paldefender-cli

scripts.release:linux: npm run build && npm run bundle:js && npm run bundle:blob && cp $(command -v node) pd-cli && npx postject pd-cli NODE_SEA_BLOB sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2
scripts.release:win: npm run build && npm run bundle:js && npm run bundle:blob && wget https://nodejs.org/dist/v24.15.0/win-x64/node.exe -O pd-cli.exe && npx postject pd-cli.exe NODE_SEA_BLOB sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2
scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log('\x1b[36mNote: This is a PalDefender Beta client. Check for breaking changes at the GitHub repo.\x1b[0m')"

author: GlitchApotamus
description: A high-performance CLI for managing PalDefender REST API servers with dynamic method discovery.
